document.source_title: IPL 2026 Points Table Today: GT vs SRH Update Orange & Purple Cap, Runs and Wickets List

claims.claim_text: Gujarat Titans are at the top of the IPL 2026 points table after defeating Sunrisers Hyderabad.
claims.evidence_text: The Gujarat Titans whooshed to the top of the table after thrashing Sunrisers Hyderabad by 82 runs.

claims.claim_text: Heinrich Klaasen leads the Orange Cap list with 508 runs.
claims.evidence_text: Hyderabad’s Heinrich Klaasen still leads the run scoring charts with 508 runs.

claims.claim_text: Kagiso Rabada moved to 2nd in the Purple Cap race after taking 3 wickets.
claims.evidence_text: Gujarat Titans bowler Kagiso Rabada went up to 2nd from the 3rd position after his 3-wicket haul against Hyderabad.

entities.name: Gujarat Titans
entities.description: A franchise cricket team based in Ahmedabad, India.
entities.evidence_text: The Gujarat Titans whooshed to the top of the table after thrashing Sunrisers Hyderabad by 82 runs.

entities.name: Sunrisers Hyderabad
entities.description: A franchise cricket team based in Hyderabad, India.
entities.evidence_text: The heavy defeat dented SRH’s run rate but they still maintained their standings in the play-offs spots at No 3.

entities.name: Heinrich Klaasen
entities.description: A South African cricketer who plays for Sunrisers Hyderabad.
entities.evidence_text: Hyderabad’s Heinrich Klaasen still leads the run scoring charts with 508 runs.

entities.name: Kagiso Rabada
entities.description: A South African cricketer who plays for Gujarat Titans.
entities.evidence_text: Gujarat Titans bowler Kagiso Rabada went up to 2nd from the 3rd position after his 3-wicket haul against Hyderabad.

events.event: Gujarat Titans vs Sunrisers Hyderabad match
events.evidence_text: Gujarat Titans absolutely blew away Sunrisers Hyderabad by 82 runs in a low-scoring affair.

metrics.name: Gujarat Titans runs scored
metrics.evidence_text: Batting first, GT lost both Shubman Gill and Jos Buttler cheaply but the third player of their big 3, Sai Sudharsan stood up with a 61 while Washington Sundar’s rearguard 50 helped them post 168/5.

metrics.name: Sunrisers Hyderabad runs scored
metrics.evidence_text: Chasing, Hyderabad suffered an almighty collapse, skittling out for just 86 runs.
